mapper.select: SELECT mth.matching_number AS "matching_number", mtr.member_name AS "mentor_name", mte.member_name AS "mentee_name", mth.matching_start AS "matching_start" FROM UB_MATCHING mth INNER JOIN UB_MEMBER mtr ON mth.mentor_number = mtr.member_number INNER JOIN UB_MEMBER mte ON mth.mentee_number = mte.member_number WHERE mth.matching_state != '매칭됨' ORDER BY mth.matching_number
